# PERF-002 negative: strconv.AppendInt with reused buffer
lang: go
file: PERF-002-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

func JoinNumbers(values []int) string {
	parts := make([]string, len(values))
	buf := make([]byte, 0, 16)
	for i, v := range values {
		buf = strconv.AppendInt(buf[:0], int64(v), 10)
		parts[i] = strings.Clone(string(buf))
	}
	var b strings.Builder
	for _, p := range parts {
		b.WriteString(p)
		b.WriteByte(',')
	}
	return b.String()
}
